en: You are getting this category because you selected ISO 14001:2015 in the Avetta PQF - ISO Certifications Questionnaire\n\nISO Certificates issued for the a prior standard that are still valid and not expired will be accepted. If your organization also has a country specific certificate that is equivalent to the ISO Standard listed below, that certification will also be accepted as long as it is still valid.
Please upload your ISO/IEC 20000-1:2018 - Information Technology — Service Management — Part 1: Service Management System Requirements certificate:
